positive: A minimalist, ethereal silhouette of a stylized astronaut planting a glowing, geometric sapling on a crescent moon. The astronaut's suit should feature clean, flowing lines, and the sapling emits soft, vibrant neon cyan and magenta light, contrasting sharply against a deep indigo and cosmic teal nebula background. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, designed for a premium apparel print. Studio quality, vector illustration style, high contrast, dramatic rim lighting, octane render, clean line art, pop art influences, graphic novel aesthetic.
